behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all the relevant files (pr.md, PLAN-TEMPLATE.md, post-gate.md, README-AI.md, Review-PR.ps1, ai-summary-comment scripts) and the literal strings to remove ('5-phase', 'Phase 2: Tests').

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the goal (remove Tests phase, renumber to 4 phases) without specifying line-level changes or variable names.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific gold variable names like `$testsContent = Get-SectionByPattern`, `$testsSection = New-PhaseSection`, `$phaseSections += $testsSection`, and `"Tests" = ` — an alternative correct refactor using different variable names or a different removal approach (e.g., commenting out, or restructuring the phaseStatuses hashtable differently) could fail these substring checks.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute pwsh subprocess calls to parse and load PowerShell scripts (via _parse_pwsh and Get-Command), in addition to text checks.

test_not_tautological.reason: F2p tests require actual removal of specific content and the 4-phase string in Review-PR.ps1; a stub implementation couldn't pass without real edits.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover the script changes, 4-phase numbering in Review-PR.ps1, and retention of core phases in templates.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (fail_to_pass, pass_to_pass, repo_tests) with docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is documentation/script refactoring, not structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths and filenames in instruction.md match the repository structure.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files to look at but localization across many files is part of the task; it does not specify exact lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold diff makes localized edits (string replacements and removal of Tests-specific blocks) across many config/doc files, not full rewrites.
